seo.defaultTitle: Radhe Packers and Movers — Move Anywhere in India, Fast, Safe & Transparent
seo.description: India's most trusted packers & movers marketplace. Compare prices from 18,500+ verified vendors instantly. Live tracking, damage protection, lowest price guarantee.

home.title: Radhe Packers and Movers — India's #1 Packers & Movers Marketplace
home.description: Compare quotes from 18,500+ verified packers and movers across 120+ cities in India. Transparent pricing, live tracking, damage protection.

hero.subheading: Compare 18,500+ verified packers & movers across India. Transparent pricing, live tracking, and zero drama.

howItWorks.heading: Moving home?
howItWorks.description: No more phone calls, hidden charges, or sketchy agents. We built this so you can move without losing your weekend — or your sanity.

steps.title: Tell us where
steps.description: Drop your pickup, destination, and house size. It takes about 20 seconds — we timed it.

steps.title: Compare quotes
steps.description: Instant quotes from 10+ vendors. See every rupee upfront.

steps.title: Book & chill
steps.description: Confirm in one tap. Track your move live. Pay after delivery.

cta.heading: Let's get your home shifted safely
cta.description: Join 2.4 million happy families who moved with us. Compare prices and book your move in under 2 minutes.

contact.note: Contact details are managed via environment variables. Update .env.local to change.
